name: flutterflow
description: Build and edit FlutterFlow projects from Codex with the CLI and workspace-bound MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Build and edit FlutterFlow apps from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds secure FlutterFlow AI onboarding and version-matched workspace guidance for typed project context, branch-aware editing, workspace tests, CLI pushes, diagnostics, code export, and project-scoped MCP. Current FlutterFlow workspaces can auto-register their vendored MCP server with Codex.
defaultPrompt: Export my FlutterFlow project to Flutter code.
